prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第63名，近年排名稳定在第60–65区间，学校综合实力保持稳定；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般偏暖；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，水利特色鲜明，相关专业对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校工科优势匹配；土木建筑类热度分化观望。广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年（约38万）增加约3.2%，物理类考生估算约26.9万（较2025年增约3.3%），竞争整体加剧。省控线2024–2025年物理类本科批稳定在370–371分，特殊类型控制线495–501分，卷面难度基本持平；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角热门地域，对广西考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在广西招生占比约2.2%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13302、2026年扩招约6.3%的缓和效应、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%的竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳及工科专业热度偏暖等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增量效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约13831名，区间13331–14331名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8955 → 9892 → 7647 → 23524 → 13302. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao major group segmentation, an abnormally low ranking (23524) appeared, which returned to 13302 in 2025, showing significant fluctuations in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 13302. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category: 149 in 2021, 158 in 2022, 161 in 2023, 161 in 2024, 160 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 170, an increase of about 6.3% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and has a mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking in the 60–65 range in recent years, maintaining overall comprehensive strength. Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is generally warm. Water Resources Engineering A+ (top in China), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, with distinctive water conservancy characteristics, making related majors highly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, matching the university's engineering strengths. Civil and Architecture majors show divided sentiment. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi Gaokao is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from 2025 (about 380,000). Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 269,000 (an increase of about 3.3% from 2025), intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2024–2025 is stable at 370–371 points, and the special type control line is 495–501 points, with basically the same exam difficulty. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13302, the mitigating effect of about 6.3% expansion in 2026, the intensification of competition due to about 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, stable university reputation, and warm engineering major popularity, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13831, with a range of 13331–14331.

Candidates within the range are advised to mainly fill Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Water Resources and Hydropower, Automation, New Energy, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Dayu Intensive Class) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, Geology, etc.) as safety choices. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13331) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (>14331) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1486 → 1824 → 1794 → 6693 → 2552. In 2024, due to the subdivision of major groups under the new college entrance examination, an abnormally low ranking (6693) occurred, but it rebounded significantly to 2552 in 2025. The baseline over the past 3 years is approximately 1794–2552, with the 2025 baseline at about 2552. The enrollment plan for history category in Guangxi: 28 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 22, a sharp reduction of about 29% compared to 2025, which is significant and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, indicating consistent overall strength. Its reputation has remained stable, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. Douyin popularity ranks 52nd (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure, and generally warm attention from applicants. Hydraulic Engineering is A+, Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A. Although primarily engineering-focused, the university's overall 211 status still attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors like law, accounting/finance/auditing are recommended or viewed with differentiation; teacher training/education is viewed with differentiation. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from 2025 (about 380,000). The estimated number of history category candidates is about 123,000 (an increase of about 3.3% from 2025), intensifying overall competition. The provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch in 2024–2025 is stable at 400–402 points, and the special type control line is 518–519 points, with basically stable exam difficulty. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2552, the intensified competition effect from a sharp 29% enrollment reduction in 2026, the competitive pressure from a 3.3% increase in Guangxi history category candidates, and the stable university reputation, the enrollment reduction is the most critical factor affecting rankings. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2088, with a range of 1712–2464.
